chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2254 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A 737/19 22.01.2019 Mr. Mazhar Ali Laghari advocate for petitioner...... Urgency granted. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the grievance of the petitioner has been redressed and he has been appointed on the post of Khalasi (BPS-2), and has submitted the documents to this effect. In view of above, this petition stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
